title: I upload art once and earn royalties every month #printondemand
spoken_script: 20 designs on Redbubble. I uploaded them months ago. They still sell every week. Print on demand means zero inventory. Zero shipping. Zero customer service. Redbubble handles all of it. You just upload the design once and collect the royalty when it sells. T-shirts. Phone cases. Mugs. Posters. Stickers. All from one upload. I also list on Teepublic and Society6 for double the income from the same file. Guide at link in bio on exactly how to set this up.
